name: finance-command
title: Finance & FP&A Command Center
subtitle: revenue range, forecast confidence, variance, cost structure & the close calendar
description: A finance showcase spanning eight distinct visual forms not used elsewhere in the gallery: a candlestick view of monthly revenue range, a shaded forecast confidence band, a diverging budget-variance chart, a radial ranking of KPI attainment, a two-level cost-structure icicle, a chord diagram of inter-department fund transfers, multi-metric regional profiles on parallel axes, and a close-process Gantt timeline.

dataAccesses.name: FinanceKPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(revenue_growth_pct),1) AS revenue_growth_pct, ROUND(AVG(gross_margin_pct),1) AS gross_margin_pct, ROUND(AVG(cash_conversion_index),0) AS cash_conversion_index, ROUND(AVG(forecast_accuracy_pct),1) AS forecast_accuracy_pct FROM v_finance_master

dataAccesses.name: MonthlyRevenueRange
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.month_name AS month_name, MIN(r.open_amt) AS open_revenue, MAX(r.high_amt) AS high_revenue, MIN(r.low_amt) AS low_revenue, MAX(r.close_amt) AS close_revenue FROM v_revenue_range r JOIN dim_date d ON r.date_key = d.date_key GROUP BY d.month_number, d.month_name ORDER BY d.month_number

dataAccesses.name: RevenueForecastBand
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.month_name AS month_name, f.p10_amt AS forecast_low, f.p90_amt AS forecast_high, f.expected_amt AS forecast_actual FROM v_revenue_forecast f JOIN dim_date d ON f.date_key = d.date_key ORDER BY d.month_number

dataAccesses.name: BudgetVarianceByDept
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT dept.dept_name AS dept_name, ROUND(SUM(b.actual_amt - b.budget_amt) / NULLIF(SUM(b.budget_amt),0) * 100, 1) AS budget_variance_pct FROM v_budget_actuals b JOIN dim_dept dept ON b.dept_id = dept.id GROUP BY dept.dept_name

dataAccesses.name: KpiAttainmentRanking
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT kpi_name AS kpi_name, ROUND(attainment_pct, 0) AS attainment_pct FROM v_kpi_attainment ORDER BY attainment_pct DESC LIMIT 6

dataAccesses.name: CostStructureBreakdown
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT c.cost_item AS cost_item, SUM(c.amount) AS cost_amount, c.cost_category AS cost_category FROM v_cost_ledger c GROUP BY c.cost_item, c.cost_category

dataAccesses.name: InterDeptFundTransfers
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT src.dept_name AS from_dept, dst.dept_group AS to_dept_group, SUM(t.amount_usd) AS transfer_usd FROM v_fund_transfers t JOIN dim_dept src ON t.from_dept_id = src.id JOIN dim_dept dst ON t.to_dept_id = dst.id GROUP BY src.dept_name, dst.dept_group

dataAccesses.name: RegionalPerformanceProfiles
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT r.region_name AS region_name, r.revenue_growth_idx AS revenue_growth_idx, r.margin_pct AS margin_pct, r.cash_conversion_idx AS cash_conversion_idx, r.csat_score AS csat_score FROM v_regional_performance r

dataAccesses.name: CloseProcessTimeline
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT task_name AS task_name, start_offset AS start_offset, end_offset AS end_offset FROM v_close_calendar ORDER BY start_offset

kpis.label: Gross Margin
kpis.info: Gross margin across all business lines.

kpis.label: Cash Conversion Index
kpis.info: Composite index of how quickly revenue converts to cash.

kpis.label: Forecast Accuracy
kpis.info: How closely actuals tracked the prior forecast.

panels.title: Monthly Revenue Range
panels.info: Revenue range for each month: the opening and closing figures plus the intra-month high and low.

panels.title: Revenue Forecast Confidence Band
panels.info: The forecast corridor (10th–90th percentile) with the expected actual line running through it.

panels.title: Budget Variance by Department
panels.info: Departments running over budget extend right; departments under budget extend left.

panels.title: KPI Attainment Ranking
panels.info: How each top-level finance KPI is tracking against its target, ranked outermost-to-innermost.

panels.title: Cost Structure Breakdown
panels.info: Cost line items partitioned by category — category share on top, individual line items below.

panels.title: Inter-Department Fund Transfers
panels.info: Internal fund transfers between departments, shown as a circular flow diagram.

panels.title: Regional Performance Profiles
panels.info: Every region's profile across four key metrics at once — a crossing line means a trade-off between metrics.

panels.title: Month-End Close Timeline
panels.info: Every task in the month-end close process, from kickoff to books-closed.
